task_completion.description: Agent mounted and inspected the finance department volume.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the VeraCrypt GUI with finance_dept.hc mounted and its Volume Properties window open (showing AES and SHA-512), or terminal output from a VeraCrypt command displaying these properties.

task_completion.description: Agent mounted and inspected the HR department volume.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the VeraCrypt GUI with hr_dept.hc mounted and its Volume Properties window open (showing Serpent and SHA-256), or terminal output from a VeraCrypt command displaying these properties.

task_completion.description: Agent mounted and inspected the engineering department volume.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the VeraCrypt GUI with engineering_dept.hc mounted and its Volume Properties window open (showing Twofish and Whirlpool), or terminal output from a VeraCrypt command displaying these properties.

task_completion.description: Agent created the structured JSON compliance report with correct extracted properties.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the contents of encryption_audit_report.json. It must contain valid JSON with today's date, auditor 'ga', and an array of volumes matching the correct encryption and hash algorithms for each respective file.

task_completion.description: Agent dismounted all volumes after completing the audit.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the VeraCrypt GUI with all drive slots empty, or a terminal showing the successful execution of a dismount command (e.g., 'veracrypt -d') after the report was created.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely interacted with VeraCrypt to extract properties.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for actual usage of the VeraCrypt GUI or CLI commands to mount the volumes. The agent should not just guess the algorithms or use a pre-written script without interacting with the software.

integrity.description: Agent inspected the volumes before writing the final report.
integrity.visual_evidence: The JSON file creation or population should happen after the agent has viewed the properties of the volumes in VeraCrypt.

integrity.description: The report is saved in the correct directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor or terminal commands must show the file being saved exactly at /home/ga/Documents/encryption_audit_report.json, not in a temporary folder or just printed to standard output.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected JSON report must be saved at /home/ga/Documents/encryption_audit_report.json. The correct properties for the volumes are: finance_dept.hc (Encryption: AES, Hash: SHA-512), hr_dept.hc (Encryption: Serpent, Hash: SHA-256), engineering_dept.hc (Encryption: Twofish, Hash: Whirlpool). The volume_type for all should be 'Normal'.
